story.title: Kerala Man Makes Any Perfume In 10 Minutes!
story.logline: An aspiring perfumer demonstrates whether you can truly master perfume making in one day by crafting a scent in just 10 minutes, weaving in top notes, heart notes, base notes, blending.
story.setting: a compact fragrance lab with evaluation strips and raw material bottles
story.conflict_tension: Will this perfume-making routine actually work for the viewer?
story.visual_hook: Clear before-and-after shots of the perfume creation process and detailed routine steps for mastering perfume in one day.
story.ending_beat: evaluation strip test showing scent longevity and projection, summarizing the results.
story.style_direction: premium documentary realism instructional demo for vertical 9:16 YouTube Shorts. Purpose: teach can you master perfume in one day? step by step with clear hands-on detail. Camera: handheld-inspired stability with observational framing. Lighting: natural motivated available light with soft contrast.
